title: High stakes battle in Harsidhi as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Harsidhi. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Women voters of Harsidhi demand better primary healthcare and clean water
snippet_text: A coalition of local self-help groups in Harsidhi has presented a list of demands to major political parties emphasizing sanitational assets.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Harsidhi triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Harsidhi, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.

title: Voter turnout expected to touch record highs in Harsidhi
snippet_text: Electoral awareness campaigns and intense political mobilization by party workers point to a high turnout of youth and women voters in Harsidhi constituency.

title: Political rally in Harsidhi draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Harsidhi promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Flood protection works in Harsidhi inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Harsidhi.
